hook: Your water bottle is making you sick
body: That reusable bottle you've been using for months? If you're not washing it daily, bacteria is literally multiplying inside. Scientists found that some bottles had more germs than a toilet seat. Takes 30 seconds to clean properly — hot water, dish soap, let it air dry. Your future self will thank you for not getting that mystery stomach ache.
cta: Save this and actually do it tomorrow. Comment what color your water bottle is.
style_notes: Start with close-up of water bottle, cut to microscope footage (or AI-generated bacteria animation), show quick cleaning demo with speed-up effect. Text overlay: 'BACTERIA COUNT: 9,000%' Use concerned but helpful tone, not preachy. Background: trending audio about 'things you didn't know were gross.'
